shipping_fee: At Malidag, we aim to offer transparent and competitive shipping fees tailored to your location and the nature of your order. Shipping costs are dynamically calculated during checkout, taking into account factors such as destination, shipping method, item weight, and packaging size.  We partner with multiple international carriers to provide the best available rates for both standard and express delivery options. During the checkout process, you’ll be able to view the exact shipping cost before completing your purchase — no hidden fees or unexpected charges.  For larger orders or those exceeding a certain value threshold, we may offer free shipping promotions, which will be clearly indicated at checkout. These offers may vary by region and time of year.  If you have any questions about shipping costs or eligibility for free shipping, feel free to contact our support team. We’re here to help you make the most informed and cost-effective decision for your delivery needs.
international_shipping_policy: Malidag is committed to serving customers around the globe with reliable international shipping. We recognize the importance of accessibility and convenience, which is why we have built a logistics network that reaches across continents. No matter where you are located, we strive to ensure that your shopping experience is seamless and efficient. Our international shipping services extend to Europe, Africa, Asia, the Americas, and beyond. Through trusted global delivery partners, we are able to provide timely and secure transportation of your orders. Every shipment is carefully managed to maintain product quality and ensure customer satisfaction. At Malidag, we view international shipping as more than a service — it’s a promise. A promise to make our products available to a diverse and growing global community. Whether you’re a first-time shopper or a returning customer, you can expect professionalism, reliability, and consistent care in every order we fulfill.

Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph1: At Malidag, we understand that timely delivery is an essential part of your shopping experience. That’s why we work closely with trusted international carriers to ensure your orders reach you safely and efficiently, no matter where you are in the world.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph2: Estimated delivery times vary based on your destination, the shipping method selected at checkout, and any applicable customs clearance processes. While we strive to meet the timelines below, occasional delays due to local postal services or international regulations may occur.
standard: Standard Shipping: Typically delivered within 7 to 21 business days, depending on location and postal service conditions.
express: Express Shipping: Arrives within 3 to 7 business days for most international destinations via premium carriers.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph3: You’ll receive a tracking number as soon as your order ships, so you can monitor its journey in real time. If your package is delayed beyond the estimated window, our support team is always available to help resolve the issue quickly.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph4: Please note that public holidays, customs inspections, or remote delivery areas may add extra time. We recommend choosing express shipping for time-sensitive orders.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph1: At Malidag, we aim to offer transparent and competitive shipping fees tailored to your location and the nature of your order. Shipping costs are dynamically calculated during checkout, taking into account factors such as destination, shipping method, item weight, and packaging size.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph2: We partner with multiple international carriers to provide the best available rates for both standard and express delivery options. During the checkout process, you’ll be able to view the exact shipping cost before completing your purchase — no hidden fees or unexpected charges.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph3: For larger orders or those exceeding a certain value threshold, we may offer free shipping promotions, which will be clearly indicated at checkout. These offers may vary by region and time of year.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph4: If you have any questions about shipping costs or eligibility for free shipping, feel free to contact our support team. We’re here to help you make the most informed and cost-effective decision for your delivery needs.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph1: Please note that all international orders may be subject to customs duties, import taxes, and other regulatory charges imposed by your local government. These fees are not included in the product or shipping prices displayed on Malidag and may be collected by your local customs authority upon delivery.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph2: As the recipient, you are solely responsible for ensuring compliance with your country’s import regulations and for paying any applicable fees. We recommend checking with your country’s customs office for specific details before placing your order.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph3: Malidag is not liable for any additional charges, customs delays, or refusal of packages due to unpaid import duties or tax-related issues. In the event a package is returned due to customs non-payment or non-compliance, any return shipping or restocking fees will be deducted from your refund.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph4: We strive to make your international shopping experience as smooth as possible and are here to assist you with any questions regarding customs or documentation. Please don’t hesitate to contact our support team before or after your purchase.
